name: Arbitrage
description: A real-time cryptocurrency price intelligence platform that continuously scans 50+ digital assets across exchanges, detects price anomalies, and fires automated email alerts — all with sub-second latency on a serverless edge infrastructure.
shortDescription: Live crypto tracker with automated email alerts and real-time asset scanning.
impact: Tracks 50+ assets in real-time with sub-second latency across serverless edge functions
heroDescription: Live crypto tracker with automated email alerts

name: NexusForce
description: A trustless, decentralized escrow platform where financial disputes are resolved by an on-chain DAO tribunal. Built with Chainlink VRF for provably fair arbitration selection, multi-signature fund release, and IPFS-anchored evidence storage — removing the need for any centralized intermediary.
shortDescription: Decentralized escrow with DAO-governed dispute resolution and Chainlink VRF arbitration.
impact: Fully trustless multi-sig escrow with verifiable on-chain randomness for dispute arbitration

name: SkyLens
description: A satellite imagery intelligence platform built for ISRO BAH 2026 that ingests Sentinel-5P TROPOMI spectral data to detect AQI anomalies and HCHO concentration patterns across Indian geography. Combines XGBoost regression models with real-time Leaflet.js visualization, containerized on Docker and served via a FastAPI inference layer.
shortDescription: Satellite AQI and pollution detection using Sentinel-5P TROPOMI data — ISRO BAH 2026 finalist.
impact: ISRO BAH 2026 finalist — Team CodeBlooded. Detects AQI anomalies across 10k+ sq km regions with 94% model accuracy

name: CipherKit
description: A production-grade C++17 static cipher library implementing Caesar, Vigenère, XOR, Base64, and ROT13 under a unified ck:: namespace — distributed via CMake FetchContent with zero external dependencies. Ships with a full GoogleTest suite, Doxygen API docs, and a GitHub Actions CI matrix that gates every merge.
shortDescription: C++17 static cipher library — zero deps, CMake FetchContent, CI across all major platforms.
impact: Zero-dependency cipher suite with green CI across Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows on every commit
